ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., truck, van) */,
  "gross_weight_rating" REAL /* Gross vehicle weight rating in kg */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the vehicle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the vehicle */,
  "manufactured_year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., diesel, electric) */,
  "fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel capacity in liters */,
  "payload_capacity" REAL /* Maximum payload capacity in kg */,
  "axle_count" INTEGER /* Number of axles */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type (e.g., 4x4, 6x6) */,
  "emission_standard" TEXT /* Emission standard the vehicle complies with */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_due_date" TEXT /* Date the next inspection is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Garbage/Recycling, Beverage) */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type (e.g., Flatbed, Tow truck) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category this type belongs to */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the vehicle type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the vehicle type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the vehicle type was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vehicle type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_types_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_classes" (
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the weight class (e.g., Light, Medium, Heavy) */,
  "min_weight" REAL /* Minimum weight for this class in kg */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* Maximum weight for this class in kg */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the weight class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the weight class was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the weight class is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_examples" (
  "example_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage example */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle this example pertains to */,
  "example_description" TEXT /* Description of how the vehicle is typically used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the usage example was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the usage example was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the usage example is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("example_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_examples_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance standard (e.g., EPA, DOT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  "issued_by" TEXT /* Agency that issued the standard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the standard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the standard was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the standard is active */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the standard became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle being assessed */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compliance standard */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., Compliant, Non-Compliant) */,
  "date_assessed" TEXT /* Date when the compliance status was assessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the compliance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the compliance record was last updated */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inspector who assessed the compliance */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_compliance_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_compliance_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES compliance_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_compliance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, inspector, fleet manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle data */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the manufacturer was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the manufacturer's information was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the manufacturer is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturer_vehicles" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle produced by the manufacturer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the association is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manufacturer_vehicles_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES vehicle_manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manufacturer_vehicles_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle being distributed */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the vehicle is distributed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of vehicles distributed to that region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the distribution record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the distribution record was last updated */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date the distribution occurred */,
  "distributor" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_distribution_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "buyer" TEXT /* Buyer of the vehicle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sale record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sale record was last updated */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_sales_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
